title: Green Bit and the Colosseum Divide the Crew
description: Pages 1–4 focus on green bit and the colosseum divide the crew, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Bartolomeo, Colosseum Fighters, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #13 as law moves toward the Caesar exchange at Green Bit while Luffy is drawn deeper into the Colosseum’s violent tournament.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: Also in B-block is this man, showing up a bit late!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Over the course of just a single year, he's smashed through the new world like a comet, rising to fame!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The 'Crazed rookie' of unparalleled brutality!!!

dialogue.text: He was behind the distribution of the "skewered pirate barbeque broadcast"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He's bomb- added and set Ablaze virtuous citizens!!!

dialogue.text: He's the number one pirate wished dead by all!!

dialogue.text: captain of the barto club pirate crew 'Bartotomee' the Counribal bounty: 150,000.00 berries

dialogue.text: The pirate, Bartolo- MeQ!!!
